site.name: Colors 'n' Shades
site.tagline: Art school for children from 4 to 12 years old
site.description: Nurturing creativity and imagination through structured art education. We provide a safe and inspiring environment where young artists can explore, experiment, and express themselves.
site.cta_primary: Sign up for a trial lesson

hero.title: Art school for children from 4 to 12 years old
hero.subtitle: Where every child discovers their inner artist
hero.description: Colors 'n' Shades provides a nurturing environment for young minds to explore drawing, painting, crafts, and more. Our experienced teachers guide each child on their unique creative journey.

young.title: Little Artists (4–6 years)
young.description: Playful introduction to colors, shapes, and textures through guided creative activities.

older.title: Junior Masters (7–12 years)
older.description: Structured art education covering drawing techniques, painting styles, and mixed media.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: My daughter has blossomed into a confident artist since joining Colors 'n' Shades. The teachers are incredible!

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.text: The best art school in Bangalore. My son looks forward to every class and has won multiple competitions.

testimonials.name: Anita Desai
testimonials.text: The curriculum is well-structured and age-appropriate. My kids learn something new every week.

testimonials.name: Vikram Patel
testimonials.text: Colors 'n' Shades has been transformative for my shy daughter. She now expresses herself beautifully through art.

about.mission: At Colors 'n' Shades, we believe every child is born with creative potential. Our mission is to provide a structured yet playful environment where children aged 4 to 12 can discover and develop their artistic abilities.
about.description: Founded with a passion for art education, Colors 'n' Shades has been nurturing young artists for over a decade. Our experienced team of artists and educators create a warm, welcoming space where children feel free to explore, experiment, and express themselves through various art forms.
about.timings: Monday to Saturday: 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM | Sunday: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM

teachers.name: Meera Krishnan
teachers.bio: With 15 years of experience in art education, Meera brings a unique blend of traditional and modern techniques to the classroom.

teachers.name: Arjun Nair
teachers.bio: A fine arts graduate with a gift for making complex techniques accessible to young learners.

teachers.name: Sneha Reddy
teachers.bio: Specializing in creative crafts, Sneha inspires children to think beyond conventional art forms.
